backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an e-commerce backend with functions to manage bats (products), shopping carts per user principal, and order checkout with customer details.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (product catalog, pricing, cart, checkout, theming, image rendering) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files including styles, components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, earthy color palette in OKLCH format for light and dark modes supporting the traditional Indian marketplace theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script tag loading the React application with title 'Uttarakhandi Bat Shop'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for catalog, cart, checkout, and order success pages, all wrapped in a Layout component.
frontend/src/components/BatCard.tsx: Product card component displaying bat details with image, name, description, price badge, and add-to-cart button with loading and success states.
frontend/src/components/CheckoutForm.tsx: Form component with validation for customer name, delivery address, and phone number that submits checkout data and navigates to order success page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo and cart icon with badge, navigation links, and footer with contact info, social links, and Caffeine attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Displays a grid of bat products using the BatCard component, with loading, error, and empty states handled via the useGetBats hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, creating authenticated or anonymous actors and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state management using AuthClient and React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching bats, viewing cart, adding items to cart, and checkout operations using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes using warm terracotta and earthy tones, plus component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays shopping cart items with total price calculation, handles empty cart state, and provides navigation to checkout or back to catalog.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Main catalog page displaying a hero banner and the ProductCatalog component with introductory text about Uttarakhandi willow bats.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page showing order summary and CheckoutForm, redirects to cart if empty, displays cart items with total price.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying success message with a checkmark icon and button to return to shopping.
frontend/src/utils/formatPrice.ts: Utility function to format prices as Indian Rupees with locale-specific number formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography, animations, and container settings.
project_state.json: Project state file for an e-commerce app selling Uttarakhandi willow cricket bats at ₹600, tracking implemented features (product catalog, cart, checkout, theming) and pending backend requirements (product data storage, order persistence).
